background: Body weights of 18 diabetics expressed as a percentage of ideal (defined as body weight ÷ ideal body weight × 100) are shown here. The data provided are: 107, 119, 99, 114, 120, 104, 88, 114, 124, 116, 101, 121, 152, 100, 125, 114, 95, 117. Construct a stem-and-leaf plot of these data and interpret your findings.

task.query: Construct a stem-and-leaf plot of the given data.
Interpret the shape of the distribution based on the stem-and-leaf plot.
task.answer: The distribution has a negative skew and high outlier.

task.query: Interpret the location of the distribution based on the stem-and-leaf plot.
Interpret the spread of the distribution based on the stem-and-leaf plot.

meta_info.caption: Body weight expressed as a percentage of ideal.
